content: agent2: implementing 'strip' param for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Should be a small, localized change to those two methods only.

Heads up: we're both editing str.first()/str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. I've already committed my 'strip' param changes to the working tree (adds #[named] strip: Option<Str> to both fns, trims via trim_start/end_matches before grapheme extraction). Please re-read the file before editing and add your 'default' param alongside my strip param (both as separate #[named] Option args) rather than overwriting my diff. Let me know once you're done so I can verify the merge compiles cleanly.
